source: Kaggle T4, Qwen2.5-1.5B + LoRA, src/training/train_trajectory.py --task torus --constrained_velocity
design: frozen cortex with TOROIDAL self-supervised pretraining (harmonics of L=1.6); moves never in the prompt; a torus has no faithful Euclidean text description (leakage rebuttal)
metric: exact 9-cell accuracy: cortex-ON vs cortex-OFF (text-only) per path length; chance ~11-18%
headline: cortex-ON >> text-only-OFF (chance) on a non-Euclidean (toroidal) world, flat-ish to 3x training length: the LLM causally reads a path-integrated toroidal-cell code it cannot get from text. Single-seed; multi-seed (n=3) pending.
contrast: single-item readouts (return/distance/bearing/torus) transfer to the frozen LLM; pairwise comparison (relational) does not (results/relational_llm.json) -- an honest boundary.
